topic: own 29 (cycle 25 base = Biology only) → generalized declarative-spec multi-section toolkit lint (mandatory + optional registries in .own)
verdict_detail: User directive 'README 의 모든 도메인 섹션들에 반영되도록 lint 수정' 후 own 29 declarative-spec generalize. .own 안에 mandatory-sections + optional-sections list registry. mandatory: heading absent → violation; optional: heading absent → silent pass + heading present → full 4-axis check. tool/own_doc_lint.py 의 check_rule_29_readme_friendly_toolkit() 가 _parse_own29_section_spec() + _check_one_toolkit_section() 으로 분해 + LIST_KEYS parser fix (multi-line same-key list handling). hexa standalone gate 는 mandatory biology 만 (raw 9 hexa-only baseline).
expected_header_template: | Tool | One-liner | Everyday analogy | What it does | <Mainstream> contrast | Doc |
header_template_flexibility: 5th column allows per-section variation (e.g. 'AlphaFold contrast' / 'Mainstream contrast' / 'Classical contrast') — regex column-shape preserved, content varies per-section
files_modified: tool/own_doc_lint.py (parse_own_file LIST_KEYS handling + _parse_own29_section_spec + _check_one_toolkit_section helpers + check_rule_29 generalized)
tool/own29_readme_friendly_toolkit_lint.hexa (docstring updated; mandatory-only scope explicit per raw 9 hexa-only)

verification.python_lint_full_sweep: 0 HARD / 0 SOFT — all 14 HARD rules PASS
verification.own_29_specifically: OK (mandatory biology PASS + 5 optional sections silent pass on heading absent)
verification.synthetic_optional_check: PASS — optional section with bad rows + bad doc link reported 2 violations as expected
verification.synthetic_optional_absent: PASS — heading absent → silent pass (0 violations)

5 optional pre-registered headings 는 cycle 25 author 가 추정 — 실제 user-OK 받은 것은 biology 1개만; 다른 5 sections 의 heading 양식 / icon / 단어 선택은 cycle 26+ user fill 시 수정 가능 (declarative 라 변경 쉬움)
hexa lint 는 mandatory-only — multi-section dispatch 는 python 책임 (raw 9 deviation 이지만 cycle 14 design 잔재; cycle 30+ rewrite 가능)
header template flexibility: '<Mainstream> contrast' 5th column 은 regex 로 임의 1-cell content 허용; 너무 strict 하면 sister section 마다 자연스러운 contrast 표현 막힘
cycle 26+ user 가 새 section 의 toolkit table 채워줬을 때 own 29 자동 PASS — pre-registered optional 6 sections (mandatory 1 + optional 5)

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: user fills AI Toolkit but pre-registered heading/axis 가 mismatch (예: heading='## 🧠 AI Toolkit' / axis='ai-ml') → lint fail despite user intent
header template '<Mainstream> contrast' 5th column regex 가 너무 loose 해서 unintended structure 통과 (예: 5th column 이 'Doc' 인 5-column malformed)
mandatory-sections list 에 같은 axis 가 2+ entries 등장 → lint dispatch double check (false positive)
parse_own_file LIST_KEYS extension 이 다른 own rule 의 same-key concat 의도 깨뜨림 (회귀)
